title: Luffy Finds Shirahoshi
description: On pages 1–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, Vander Decken, King Neptune, Narrator, Shirahoshi, Royal Guards, Luffy. The core story beat is luffy finds shirahoshi.
scene: The scene centers on luffy finds shirahoshi, with Unknown person #1, Vander Decken, King Neptune, Narrator, Shirahoshi, Royal Guards, Luffy driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wada- Tsumi!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: Nope, no response yet, Cap'n decken!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Uhh... about ten years!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Has there still been no response?! Has Princess Shirahoshii replied to my letter yet?!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: This must be the work of that detestable Neptunee!! The fiend means to force princess Shirahoshii into a political marriage!! I know it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And still no sign... maybe it'll show up soon...

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: member of the flying pirates OONYUDOU WADATSUMI (giant puffer fishman)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why else would he lock her away for ten long years in that steel tower?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, the shame of it all!! Does he not see?! The two of us are in love!!! I know it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Once again, I shall send her...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...an axe embossed with the image of a Rose...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Haaa Aaaah!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Guaaah H!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: Fools!! I never miss a target!! I know it!! Bahoho hohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohoh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It came flying back this way, CapN!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I have yet to find another woman as vast and beautiful as you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You missed good and proper!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If our love can be fulfilled, then so be it!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: But I cannot allow you to live your life with another!! If that should happen... you must die!! Shirahoshioshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshosh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: captain of the flying pirates

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: Captain of the flying pirates VANDER DECKEN IX (bullhead shark fishman)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Either swear your undying love for me!! or choose death!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes, your life is a choice... between "death or marriage"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: RyUuguu Kingdom: Royal Palace

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's coming from Shell Tower!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: That's Princess Shirahoshii's voice!! She's crying!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: UWAAA AAAA AAAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What happened to the guards at the Tower entrance?!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Why is nobody by the Princess' side?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I must apologise!! There was a mix-up with the changing of the guard!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Hey, hey, hey!! What's the matter?! I'm just a pirate who was looking for some food!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ryuuboshi- Onilsama!! Manboshi- Onisama!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Maaaan, she's noisy...! What do I do now...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A human has entered my chambers to make an attempt on my life!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I didn't know this food was yours, okayyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hining GH!!!!!!!!!

summary: Luffy Finds Shirahoshi. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
